Everything you need to know about Brookhaven 🏡RP
Step into Brookhaven’s creative world of homes, cars, and imagination. Find out how to build your dream life, explore secrets, and roleplay any story you can dream up.
Brookhaven RP 🏡 is Roblox’s ultimate life-simulation sandbox where you can live, roleplay, and design your dream lifestyle. Pick a house, grab a car, and dive into endless stories - from family life to wild adventures. Whether you’re chillin’ with friends or causing harmless chaos, Brookhaven’s world is your stage. Highlights:
🏠 Build, decorate, and customize your perfect home
🚗 Drive cars, bikes, and other rides across town with a quick tap on the vehicle icon
👕 Create your style with tons of outfits and emotes
👮 Choose your role - cop, student, doctor, firefighter, chef, or superstar
🎉 Hang out with friends, explore events, and join public RP servers for big stories
Read all about Brookhaven RP 🏡 and get the best tricks and tips here 🌆
To the guide

Everything you need to know about RIVALS
Step into the arena and prove your skill in Roblox’s ultimate competitive showdown. Learn how to build your loadout, outplay opponents, and climb the ranks to become a true Rival champion.
RIVALS ⚔️ is an intense Roblox action shooter where fast reflexes, strong movement, and smart team play rule the battlefield. Build your loadout, pick your weapons, and dive into action-packed arenas against other players. Every round rewards aim, positioning, and game sense - whether you’re farming eliminations or grinding wins for more rewards. Highlights:
⚔️ Fast-paced PvP matches that reward skill and awareness
🎯 Flexible loadouts with different primaries, secondaries, melees, and utility
💣 Explosive gadgets and mobility tools to outplay and outmaneuver enemies
🏆 Progression with coins, XP, and unlockable weapons and cosmetics
🎮 Smooth, responsive movement that makes every duel feel intense
Read all about RIVALS ⚔️ and get the best tricks and tips here 💥
To the guide

Everything you need to know about 99 Nights in the Forest 🔦
Check out everything about surviving the forest from building your first campfire to holding out through terrifying nights. Learn how to gear up, craft smart, and outlast the darkness with your crew.
99 Nights in the Forest 🔦 is a tense Roblox survival-horror where you gather by day and endure by night. Build a safe camp, manage your fire, and craft better gear while creatures stalk the treeline. Every night gets harder, especially as events scale with your party size, so smart upgrades, rescues, and base setups are key to lasting longer. Highlights:
🌲 Daytime grind: chop wood, loot buildings, forage food, and collect scrap and fuel
🌙 Night survival: keep the fire alive, counter the Deer/Owl/Ram, and hold off raids
🛠️ Crafting & upgrades: level your Crafting Bench, unlock utilities, and improve tools
🎯 Objectives & rescues: save missing kids to unlock powerful day-skip multipliers
🤝 Co-op scaling: more players means harder events, stronger enemies, and bigger raids
Read all about 99 Nights in the Forest 🔦 and get the best tricks and tips here 🔦
To the guide

Everything you need to know about [BLACK DEATH] Jujutsu Shenanigans
Jujutsu Shenanigans 🤞🔥 drops you straight into the cursed energy-fueled world of Jujutsu Kaisen where button-mashing will get you demolished. Combat is deeper than most anime games, making skill, M1 trading, and ability timing essential for winning intense PvP fights and battlegrounds encounters.
Highlights:
⚔️ Master character-specific cursed techniques and neutral combat
🔥 Fight through deep, skill-based PvP, quests, and massive boss battles
💎 Upgrade abilities, manage cursed energy, and unlock new tactical layers
🌍 Progress through a punishing learning curve to dominate the lobby
🏆 Earn rare items, cursed tools, and unique drops from group challenges
Read all about Jujutsu Shenanigans 🤞🔥 and get the best tricks and tips here 💥
To the guide

Everything you need to know about Steal a Brainrot
Get the inside scoop on the ultimate Roblox chaos-fest! Learn how to grab the brainrot, outsmart your rivals, and keep your streak alive through pure speed and meme energy.
Steal a Brainrot 🧠 is a high-stakes Roblox game that mixes tycoon-style collectors with PvP raiding. You build up a base full of money-making brainrots, then protect it while hunting for opportunities to rob other players. Rare “secret” brainrots generate huge income, but they also make you a target - especially once your base unlocks and anyone can slip in to steal your best pieces. Highlights:
🧠 Collect brainrots from the marketplace, including powerful secret-tier generators
🏠 Manage your base lock timer and friend access to protect your vault
🗡️ Raid other players’ bases, dodge defenders, and escape with stolen loot
💥 Unlock weapons and gadgets like bats, invis tools, and freezes to win fights
🔁 Deep rebirth system with cash multipliers, extra slots, and new gear across 15 levels
Read all about Steal a Brainrot 🧠 and get the best tricks and tips here 💥
To the guide

Everything you need to know about [🦆] Adopt Me!
Explore the cutest world on Roblox where pets, homes, and trading rule the day. Learn how to raise legendary pets, earn Bucks fast, and make your Adopt Me! journey shine.
Adopt Me! 🐾 is Roblox’s biggest social game - a colorful world where you can raise pets, decorate homes, and trade with millions of players. Hatch eggs, care for your pets, and show off your dream house in a friendly, ever-changing community. Whether you’re a collector, decorator, or trader, Adopt Me! keeps you hooked with new pets and seasonal updates. Highlights:
🐣 Hatch and raise pets from common to legendary
🏠 Build, decorate, and show off your dream house
💎 Trade pets and rare items with other players
🎉 Join weekly events with limited pets and furniture
👨‍👩‍👧 Roleplay as parent, baby, or pet lover with friends
Read all about Adopt Me! 🐾 and get the best tricks and tips here 🐶
To the guide

Everything you need to know about Blox Fruits
Set sail and power up in one of Roblox’s most epic adventures. Learn how to master fruit abilities, level fast, and dominate every sea with your crew.
Blox Fruits 🍇 is one of the biggest Roblox adventures ever - inspired by One Piece and packed with sword fights, sea voyages, and powerful Blox Fruits that grant insane abilities. You’ll grind through three seas, clear quests, defeat bosses, and unlock stronger fruits and fighting styles as you climb toward the level cap. With smart fruit choices like Light and Buddha, you can grind faster, awaken powers, and become one of the strongest players on the seas. Highlights:
⚔️ Master combat with swords, melee styles, guns, and fruit abilities
🍇 Collect Elemental, Beast, and Natural Blox Fruits with unique playstyles
🌊 Grind quests across three seas and dozens of islands up to max level
💪 Use meta picks like Light and Buddha for efficient farming and boss grinding
🔥 Awaken fruits, unlock advanced fighting styles, and take on late-game raids
Read all about Blox Fruits 🍇 and get the best tricks and tips here 🌊

Everything you need to know about Slime RNG
Slime RNG 🎲💧 is an addictive incremental idle simulator where you press a button, pray to the RNG gods, and build an army of rare slimes. You roll for fighters of varying rarities, deploy them to auto-battle enemy spawns, and collect coins to funnel into a massive upgrade tree. Deciding what to upgrade and when to Rebirth is essential for scaling your coin economy and getting the most OP team possible.
Highlights:
🎲 Roll for five tiers of slimes: Base, Big, Shiny, Huge, and Inverted
⚔️ Deploy your squad to auto-battle enemies and farm passive coin drops
💎 Buy critical upgrades like Auto-Roll, Slime Slots, and Luck boosts
🌍 Unlock 20 unique zones like Volcano, Cave, and Heaven for permanent Luck bonuses
🏆 Defeat enemies to farm Goop, execute Rebirths, and unlock the Crafting Machine
Read all about Slime RNG 🎲💧 and get the best tricks and tips here 💥
To the guide

Everything you need to know about Murder Mystery 2
Step into Roblox’s ultimate whodunit! Learn how to play as innocent, sheriff, or murderer - master every role, outsmart your enemies, and survive the chaos in style.
Murder Mystery 2 🔪 is one of Roblox’s most legendary social deduction games where every round keeps you guessing. You’ll play as either Innocent, Sheriff, or Murderer - each with their own way to win. The tension builds fast as players hide, hunt, and try to figure out who’s who before it’s too late. Highlights:
🔪 Three roles: Innocent, Sheriff, and Murderer - with unique objectives
🕵️ Read movement and behavior to spot the killer (or hide your own role)
💥 Fast-paced, round-based gameplay full of twists and betrayals
🎯 Master gun and knife aim for clutch Sheriff shots and knife throws
💎 Collect rare knives, guns, powers, and effects to flex your inventory

Everything you need to know about The Strongest Battlegrounds
Unleash your inner fighter and master anime-inspired combat in The Strongest Battlegrounds 💥. Learn how to chain combos, unlock new powers, and dominate the arena with style and precision.
The Strongest Battlegrounds 💥 is a high-energy Roblox fighting game inspired by the anime “One Punch Man.” Battle other players using unique character abilities, flashy moves, and cinematic finishers that make every duel feel like a full-blown anime showdown. From rapid M1 chains to huge special attacks that launch opponents across the map, every moment is pure hype. Highlights:
💥 Fast-paced arena combat with anime-style powers and effects
👊 Distinct characters with unique kits, strengths, and weaknesses
⚡ Deep combat system with M1 chains, dashes, blocks, critical hits, and combo extenders
🔥 Advanced tech like uppercuts, wall combos, and aerial follow-ups for massive damage
🏆 Fight in public brawls or private duels to prove you’re one of the strongest
Read all about The Strongest Battlegrounds 💥 and get the best tricks and tips here ⚔️

Everything you need to know about [🌋] Kick a Lucky Block
Kick a Lucky Block 🦵📦 is a chaotic Roblox simulator where you train your kick power, launch Lucky Blocks across massive rarity zones, and sprint back to safety before a giant tsunami wipes you out. Every successful run gives you Brainrots that generate passive income, helping you unlock stronger weights, faster speed boosts, and crazier rewards. The gameplay loop is super addictive - kick farther, survive longer, and stack your base with rare loot.
Highlights:
🦵 Train with weights to increase your kick power
🌊 Escape deadly tsunami waves after every kick
🧠 Collect Brainrots that earn passive cash at your base
⚡ Unlock rebirths for permanent money multipliers
💎 Reach higher rarity zones for insane rewards and mutations
Read all about Kick a Lucky Block 🦵📦 and get the best tricks and tips here 🧠🔥

Everything you need to know about [🌵UPD] Fish It! 🐟
Dive into the chill world of Fish It! 🐟 where every cast counts! Discover how to catch rare fish, upgrade your gear, and master the art of the perfect reel.
Fish It 🎣 is a chill-but-deep Roblox fishing sim where you fish, sell, and upgrade your way across multiple islands. You begin on Stingray Shores with a simple rod, casting into the water and timing your release with the luck meter to hook better fish. Sell your catches to the merchant, finish quests, and level up to unlock boats, new islands, potions, enchants, and stronger rods with better Luck, Speed, and Weight stats. Highlights:
🎣 Simple cast-and-luck-meter gameplay that rewards timing and better rods
🐟 100+ fish types across multiple islands, with Uncommon, Rare, Epic, Legendary, and Mythic classes
🛠️ Rod progression with Luck, Speed, and Weight stats, plus potions and attachments for extra boosts
🛶 Boats and new islands like Kohana, Coral Reef, Esoteric Depths, and more with unique species
📜 Quests, index completion, and enchants to chase rarer fish, mutations, and long-term progression
Read all about Fish It 🎣 and get the best tricks and tips here 🐟
To the guide

Everything you need to know about Dress To Impress⭐
Step onto the runway in Dress To Impress 👗 - Roblox’s ultimate fashion competition game. Learn how to create stunning outfits, master themes, and strut your style to victory as you compete against players from around the world.
Dress To Impress 👗 is a stylish Roblox fashion game where creativity and confidence take center stage. Players compete in themed runway shows by dressing up their avatars with outfits, accessories, and poses that fit the challenge. After the catwalk, everyone votes — so every outfit counts! Whether you’re aiming for elegance, chaos, or pure originality, this game is your chance to shine. Highlights:
👗 Create outfits that match each theme and wow the judges
💄 Mix and match from thousands of clothing items and accessories
🏆 Compete in live fashion battles and earn stars and cash
🌟 Unlock rare items, animations, and emotes for next-level style
🎭 Express yourself through poses, walk styles, and color palettes

Everything you need to know about Sol's RNG [ Eon 1 - 21🪐]
Test your luck and chase rare auras in Sol’s RNG 🌞 - a Roblox game where every roll could unlock something extraordinary. Learn how to maximize your odds, collect divine auras, and flex your rarest finds with cosmic style.
Sol’s RNG 🌞 is a Roblox luck-based collector game where you stand on a small island and roll for auras with wildly different rarities. Every press of the Roll button has a chance to give you something common… or a one-in-a-billion flex. As you play, you’ll store auras in your inventory, craft gear at Jake’s Workshop, and upgrade potions with Stella to push your luck even higher.
Highlights:
🌞 Roll infinitely for dozens of unique auras with massively different rarity tiers
💫 Use luck boosts like 2x rolls, Auto Roll, and crafted items to speed up progress
🧪 Collect and upgrade potions to get powerful temporary luck buffs
⚙️ Craft items at Jake’s Workshop that improve luck or reduce roll cooldown
📦 Manage storage, coins, and recipes while chasing the rarest auras in the game

Everything you need to know about Fling Things and People
Welcome to pure physics chaos in Fling Things and People 🌀 - the Roblox sandbox where everything (and everyone) is throwable. Learn how to grab, toss, and launch your friends across wild maps while unlocking new powers, funny items, and unstoppable momentum.
Fling Things and People 🌀 is a hilarious Roblox sandbox physics game where your main goal is simple - grab stuff and throw it! Pick up anything you see (including players), yeet it across the map, and watch chaos unfold. From tiny props to giant structures, everything reacts to your strength and trajectory. It’s goofy, free-form fun with endless replay value. Highlights:
🌀 Grab and fling players, props, and random objects around the map
💥 Unlock super-strength boosts and funny throwable gadgets
😂 Watch physics go wild with ragdolls flying everywhere
🎯 Play solo or in chaotic multiplayer matches
🎮 Customize your flings with power levels, skins, and effects
Read all about Fling Things and People 🌀 and get the best tricks and tips here 💫

Everything you need to know about Evade
Run, dodge, and survive in Evade 🏃‍♂️ - Roblox’s ultimate chase-and-survival experience. Learn how to outsmart the NextBots, master every map, and rescue teammates while keeping your cool under pressure!
Evade 🏃‍♂️ is a fast-paced Roblox survival game where you dodge unpredictable NextBots across massive maps. You can sprint, crouch, vault, and slide through obstacles while reviving teammates and staying alive until the timer ends. With utilities, cosmetics, multiple game modes, and constant updates, every match feels fresh and frantic.
Highlights:
🏃‍♂️ Outrun meme-powered NextBots across huge indoor and outdoor maps
🧭 Master routes, hiding spots, and elevation to stay alive longer
💡 Revive downed teammates to earn Points and keep the squad going
🎭 Unlock emotes, skins, and utilities to customize your style
⚙️ Use movement mechanics like vaulting, crouching, and sliding to escape danger

Everything you need to know about [🆕] Ink Game
Step into a world where art comes to life in Ink Game 🖋️ - a creative Roblox experience that blends puzzles, painting, and adventure. Learn how to draw your way through challenges, unlock abilities, and bring color back to a world drained of ink.
Ink Game 🖋️ is a tense, round-based Roblox survival experience inspired by Squid Game. You and other players wake up in a dorm, then get thrown into a sequence of games like Red Light, Green Light, Dalgona, Tug of War, Glass Bridge, Mingle, and more. One mistake usually means elimination, but clever use of powers, items, and teamwork can keep you alive all the way to the final showdown - or a surprise rebellion twist. Highlights:
🟥 Classic Squid Game modes like Red Light, Green Light, Dalgona, Tug of War, Glass Bridge, and more
🔪 PvP rounds such as Lights Out and Hide and Seek where other players can actively hunt you
⚡ Powers and tools like dash-style movement and special attacks to escape or secure kills
🎭 Multiple endings, including the final Squid Game duel or the high-intensity Rebellion route
🤝 Social strategy - form temporary alliances, bluff, or betray to stay alive
Read all about Ink Game 🖋️ and get the best tricks and tips here🩸

Step into the shadows with Murder Mystery V - a fast, intense Roblox social-deduction game where trust is fragile and every round is a mind game. Learn how to outplay killers, protect innocents, and master each role with smart strategies and sharp instincts.
Murder Mystery V 🔪 is a modern take on the classic murder-mystery formula - fast rounds, stylish maps, unique role abilities, and clutch moments.
